objective: Build an MVP pipeline that generates synthetic event data from a single RGB face image using existing facial keypoint annotations, semantic parsing, superpixels, and blob-level image-to-event prompting.

scope.input: single RGB face image with existing facial keypoint annotation
scope.domain: frontal or near-frontal human face images
scope.output: synthetic event stream, event-like representation, and debug visualizations

core_constraints: Do not train a model in this MVP.
Do not run a separate landmark detector.
Use existing keypoint annotations from the dataset.
Keep motion heuristic simple but explicitly tied to facial semantics.
